package_name: Canals, Cobblestones & Beer Halls: A Northern Europe Trilogy
overview:
• Arrive in Amsterdam and settle into the vibrant Dutch capital.

  • Explore Amsterdam’s highlights with a guided city and scenic canal tour.

  • Enjoy a traditional Dutch countryside day trip.

  • Travel to Frankfurt and unwind in the city.

  • Discover Frankfurt’s blend of modern architecture and historic charm.

  • Journey to Munich, the heart of Bavaria.

  • Visit two fairytale castles nestled in the Bavarian Alps.

  • Explore medieval Rothenburg and the unique Ries crater region.

  • Depart from Munich with unforgettable memories of your European adventure.

Amsterdam

Arrive in the charming city of Amsterdam, known for its picturesque canals, vibrant culture, and rich history. Upon arrival at the airport, you will be greeted by a representative and transferred to your hotel. Take time to relax and settle in after your journey. If time permits, step out for a leisurely stroll, enjoy a cozy café, or simply soak in the laid-back atmosphere of this beautiful Dutch capital.

Private Transfer

Holiday Inn Express Amsterdam Schiphol

Set sail on a City Canal Cruise, the most relaxing way to explore the heart of Amsterdam. Join our Travelxploria Representative and Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria as you glide through the city's iconic canals, a UNESCO World Heritage Site. Marvel at charming 17th-century merchant houses, picturesque bridges, and historic landmarks from a unique waterside perspective. With the Best on-ground Support Staff, enjoy fascinating commentary and the serene beauty of Amsterdam’s waterways. Experience this unforgettable journey with Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency for a truly immersive Dutch adventure.

City Canal Cruise

City Canal Cruise
Ticket Included

Step into the heart of Dutch heritage on a captivating Zaanse Schans, Volendam, and Marken Day Trip. Accompanied by our Travelxploria Representative and Experienced Tour Guide of Travelxploria, explore the charming windmill village of Zaanse Schans, where iconic wooden windmills, traditional clog-making, and cheese farms bring history to life. Wander through the picturesque fishing village of Volendam, savoring authentic Dutch delicacies, and take a scenic boat ride to the enchanting island of Marken, known for its wooden houses and timeless charm. With the Best on-ground Support Staff, Travelxploria, the Best Travel Agency, ensures an unforgettable journey through the Netherlands' most iconic landscapes.

Day Trip to Zaanse Schans, Volendam, and Marken

After breakfast, check out from your hotel in Amsterdam and board a high-speed train to Frankfurt. Enjoy a smooth and scenic ride through the heart of Europe, passing charming towns and lush countryside along the way. Upon arrival in Frankfurt, transfer to your hotel and check in. Spend the rest of the day at your leisure, discovering the city’s modern skyline, historic Römer square, and vibrant cultural and culinary scene.

Join Travelxploria’s representative and expert guide for an immersive Frankfurt city tour, offering the perfect introduction to its iconic landmarks. Begin at the historic Römer Square, the heart of the city's Old Town, before visiting the magnificent St. Bartholomew's Cathedral, a site of imperial coronations. Stroll through the serene Palmengarten, Frankfurt’s stunning botanical garden, and explore the Goethe House, the birthplace of Germany’s literary genius, Johann Wolfgang von Goethe. With Travelxploria, the best travel agency, experience Frankfurt’s rich history at a leisurely pace, uncovering its cultural and architectural significance while enjoying expert commentary from your local guide.

Frankfurt City Tour

Munich

After breakfast, check out from your hotel in Frankfurt and board a comfortable high-speed train to Munich. Relax as you travel through Germany’s scenic landscapes, passing rolling hills and charming villages. Upon arrival in Munich, transfer to your hotel and check in. Use the rest of the day to explore the city’s inviting streets, enjoy a Bavarian beer garden, or visit landmarks like Marienplatz and the historic Frauenkirche.

ibis Muenchen Messe

Embark on a full-day adventure from Munich with Travelxploria, exploring the legendary Neuschwanstein Castle, the fairytale fortress that inspired Disney’s Sleeping Beauty Castle. Our expert representative will guide you on a picturesque journey through the Bavarian Alps, where breathtaking landscapes unfold at every turn. Discover the castle’s enchanting turrets, grand halls, and royal history, making it one of the world’s most famous landmarks. Enjoy seamless travel with comfortable transport, hotel pick-up, and drop-off, ensuring a stress-free experience. Let Travelxploria transform your visit into a magical escape, where history and fantasy come together in an unforgettable Bavarian adventure.

Day Trip to Neuschwanstein Castle

Day Trip to Neuschwanstein Castle
Ticket Included

Embark on a captivating day trip from Munich to Rothenburg ob der Tauber and the Nördlinger Ries. Begin with a scenic drive to Rothenburg, a beautifully preserved medieval town known for its half-timbered houses, cobblestone streets, and charming old-world atmosphere. Stroll through the historic town center, visit the medieval walls, and explore unique shops and cafes. Continue to the fascinating Nördlinger Ries, a vast crater formed by a meteorite impact 15 million years ago. Discover the quaint town of Nördlingen, built within the crater, and learn about its unique geological history. This day offers a perfect blend of culture and nature.

Rothenburg and Nordlinger Ries day trip
Ticket Included
Rothenburg and Nordlinger Ries day trip
Ticket Included
Rothenburg and Nordlinger Ries day trip
Ticket Included

After enjoying your final breakfast in Munich, check out from your hotel and prepare for your departure. A comfortable transfer will take you to the airport for your return flight. As you bid farewell to Germany, take with you unforgettable memories of your incredible European journey—spanning the elegance of Paris, the charm of Belgium, and the cultural richness of the Netherlands and Germany. Your adventure concludes, but the experiences will last a lifetime.

Inclusion / Exclusion

Inclusions

  • Assistance on arrival and departure.
  • Accommodation on Twin sharing basis.
  • All Airport - Hotel - Airport transfers on Private basis.
  • All Tours & activities on sharing basis / Pvt
  • Vehicle will not be on disposal.
  • Daily breakfast at hotel.
  • City tour and canal tour
  • Zaanse Schans, Volendam and Marken Day trip
  • Frankfurt City Tour
  • From Munich: Neuschwanstein & Linderhof castle tour
  • Rothenburg and Nordlinger Ries day trip

Exclusion

  • Bank charges, payment gateway charges.
  • Expenses of personal nature such as Laundry, telephone calls, tips, Liquor, Mineral water, Airport Tax, Insurance, Meal outside hotel etc.
  • Camera Charges.
  • Additional car usage beyond Itinerary.
  • Any supplementary service not mentioned in itinerary as a suggested addition such as water sports or any similar activity.
  • Any other item not specified in "Cost Includes".
  • Additional or incremental expenses arising out of acts of god, political disturbance, strike etc.
  • Any change in government tax structure and amount becoming due thereto.
  • Currency conversion charges.
  • Return Airfare
  • 5% TCS.
  • 5% GST.

day_details.day_title: Rothenburg and Nordlinger Ries day trip
day_details.day_summary: Embark on a captivating day trip from Munich to Rothenburg ob der Tauber and the Nördlinger Ries. Begin with a scenic drive to Rothenburg, a beautifully preserved medieval town known for its half-timbered houses, cobblestone streets, and charming old-world atmosphere. Stroll through the historic town center, visit the medieval walls, and explore unique shops and cafes. Continue to the fascinating Nördlinger Ries, a vast crater formed by a meteorite impact 15 million years ago. Discover the quaint town of Nördlingen, built within the crater, and learn about its unique geological history. This day offers a perfect blend of culture and nature.

day_details.day_summary: After enjoying your final breakfast in Munich, check out from your hotel and prepare for your departure. A comfortable transfer will take you to the airport for your return flight. As you bid farewell to Germany, take with you unforgettable memories of your incredible European journey—spanning the elegance of Paris, the charm of Belgium, and the cultural richness of the Netherlands and Germany. Your adventure concludes, but the experiences will last a lifetime.
